project_constraints.charset_note: Gate FALHOU: a fonte do jogo não tem diacríticos — pangrama pt-BR renderiza como '@' (evidência in-game: artifacts/char1.png, char2.png). Estratégia adotada: TRANSLITERAÇÃO na gravação (acento→ASCII) no reinsert.py; a tradução canônica mantém os acentos. Ver decision_log.md.

glossary_subset.notes: Unidade militar do Ukon -> 'Coorte do Ukon'. Traduzir 'Cohort'->'Coorte' consistente.
Criaturas/monstros altamente venenosos (cap.12). Nome de mundo — manter.
Nome dado ao protagonista por Kuon em 11_02 (0x12668). reveal_timing: cena 11_02. Antes disso ele é sem nome.
Rótulo de falante (memória); identidade não revelada — genérico.

Erudito/escriba/mago comico e franzino do grupo do Ukon (cap.12); magia de fogo com cantico+danca longos. Fala em registro ARCAICO e comico (pleaseth/mine own; gag de cicio s->sh). Gruda no Haku como 'benfeitor'.

Guerreiro espirituoso e cativante que faz amizade com Haku ao ve-lo consertar o moinho (cap.12); lidera a 'Coorte do Ukon'. Maroro o trata por 'Mestre Ukon'. SPOILER: identidade verdadeira e reveal de arco posterior — NAO antecipar; no cap.12 e um personagem por si so. reveal_timing: alem do cap.12.

lines: Características: acolhe sem pressionar ("Apenas relaxe..."); curiosa mas paciente; calor humano.
Red flags: soar fria, clínica ou impaciente; formalidade excessiva.
Haku (protagonista, narração 1ª pessoa) — `voice_criticality: high`. Predomina nas 2 cenas:
Características: sentenças curtas e definitivas; duplo sentido ("um mundo totalmente novo te espera"); ambiguidade ameaçadora.
Red flags: soar caloroso/paternal; resolver a ambiguidade (a fala deve permanecer dúbia).
Registro: erudito cômico, pomposo e arcaico; bajulador do Ukon; alívio cômico.
Características: fala arcaica/empolada (equivalente a "vós/peço-vos/meus olhos não me enganam") + gag de cicio (s→sh, ex.: "SHEEKETH"/"shir"); melodramático; gruda no Haku como "benfeitor".
Red flags: perder o arcaísmo ou o cicio (são a piada); soar moderno/neutro; explicar a comédia. Manter o contraste entre a pompa do vocabulário e a fragilidade do personagem.
Características: frases quebradas por reticências; perguntas curtas ("Quem... é você...?"); pouca pontuação forte.
Red flags: falas fluentes/articuladas demais; perder o tom de torpor; pontuação "limpa" que apaga a fragmentação.
Registro: guerreiro carismático, espirituoso, caloroso e informal; líder nato que trata Haku como um irmão mais novo.
Características: desembaraçado, brincalhão, generoso; fala direta e cativante; autoridade leve (lidera a Coorte) sem arrogância.
Red flags: soar rígido/formal/militar demais (a graça é justamente o contraste com a patente); frieza. SPOILER: não deixar a tradução insinuar a identidade verdadeira — no cap.12 ele é só "Ukon".

decisions.title: Opcode de RÓTULO DE FALANTE `53 00` + reconcile de speaker (data-driven)
decisions.summary: **Problema:** in-game, o rótulo de falante aparecia em **inglês** ("Girl") mesmo com a tradução ("Garota") aprovada e gravada. RE: o nome do falante usa um **2º opcode de ponteiro, `53 00`** (mesmo formato file-relativo do `50 00` de diálogo), que o conector ignorava. Resultado: "Girl"→"Garota"

decisions.title: Gate de charset pt-BR — método e veredito
decisions.summary: **Decisão tomada:** Marcar `target_charset_supported: likely` e exigir confirmação in-game antes de produção. **Alternativas consideradas:** - Confirmar por presença no texto-fonte — **insuficiente**: o fonte é inglês e quase não usa acentos (só `õ` e `À` aparecem em texto real).

decisions.title: Anomalia 0x33f9 — texto PT/EN corrompido na fonte
decisions.summary: **Decisão tomada:** Marcar a linha `0x33f9` como anomalia de fonte (não traduzir em cima do lixo; tratar como linha de sistema reescrita). **Razão:** A string original já vem misturada PT/EN e truncada ("...SISTEMAS AM . RESTARTING...") no próprio jogo. Não é erro de extração. O conector deve sinali

decisions.title: Charset — transliteração na gravação (gate FALHOU)
decisions.summary: **Decisão tomada:** Marcar `target_charset_supported: false` e **transliterar** (acento → ASCII) na gravação do binário. A tradução canônica (`approved_translations.csv`, `translation_plan.json`) **mantém os acentos** (correta para QA/revisão); apenas os bytes escritos no jogo são dobrados para ASCI

decisions.title: Escopo cognitivo — 75 → 1025 linhas (cenas 11_01 + 11_02); reveal de Haku in-corpus
decisions.summary: **Decisão tomada:** Re-rodar o pipeline completo em escala (cenas 11_01 + 11_02 = 1025 linhas). Novos termos canônicos: **Kuon** (nome revelado em 0x108db), **Haku** (nome dado ao protagonista em 0x12668 — reveal agora **dentro do corpus**), **Tatari** (criatura imortal), **aperyu** (vestimenta), **

decisions.title: CORREÇÃO CRÍTICA — ponteiros são FILE-RELATIVOS, não absolutos
decisions.summary: **Decisão tomada:** Ao investigar o "opcode de início de bloco", descobri que **`50 00`+uint32 é um offset RELATIVO ao início do arquivo (Pack)**, não absoluto. Endereço da string = `file_start_do_site + uint32`. Prova: dos ~47k sites, **42.101** só apontam para string como file-relativos vs **63**

tm_voice.speaker: Haku
tm_voice.source: Well, guess the sun still rises no matter where\n
tm_voice.target: Enfim, o sol nasce em qualquer lugar, pelo visto\n

tm_voice.speaker: Haku
tm_voice.source: I am. Still... What am I supposed to do now...?
tm_voice.target: Pois é. Mesmo assim... O que é que eu faço agora...?

tm_voice.speaker: Garota
tm_voice.source: Hey, you there! Could you spare a moment?
tm_voice.target: Ei, você aí! Pode me dar um momento?

tm_voice.speaker: Garota
tm_voice.source: Hey, I'm sorry for bothering you, but could I ask\n

tm_voice.speaker: Maroro
tm_voice.source: Master Ukon! It pleaseth my heart to report my\n
tm_voice.target: Mestre Ukon! É com grande satisfação que reporto que meus\n

tm_voice.speaker: Maroro
tm_voice.source: belongings lay duly unpack'd, and await porters.
tm_voice.target: meus pertences estão desfeitos e aguardam os carregadores.

tm_voice.speaker: Maroro
tm_voice.source: I am VERY tired, sir. Naught more now do I desire\n
tm_voice.target: Estou MUITO cansado, senhor. Nada mais desejo agora\n

tm_voice.speaker: Ukon
tm_voice.source: Really, Maroro? Seems like you get tired quicker\n
tm_voice.target: É sério, Maroro? Parece que você se cansa mais rápido\n

tm_voice.speaker: Homem
tm_voice.source: We have enchanted you with a spell that will help\n
tm_voice.target: Lançamos sobre você um feitiço que irá ajudá-lo\n

tm_voice.speaker: Homem
tm_voice.source: you become stronger in sleep, as requested, Master.
tm_voice.target: a ficar mais forte enquanto dorme, como pedido, Mestre.

spoiler_guards.fact: A identidade verdadeira de Ukon (ele e mais do que um guerreiro espirituoso).
spoiler_guards.guard: Traduza as falas de/sobre Ukon como o personagem 'Ukon' por si so. NAO insinue outra identidade, patente oculta ou disfarce. Mantenha qualquer ambiguidade do original.

lines.source: lightA01
lightA02
Hahh, h-hah, hahhh...
Not bad, kid.
Hah... wheeze... Yeah?
I-I survived... somehow.
You look beat. Go rest up and leave the rest to us.
This is your first time doing stuff like this, yeah?\n
So I'll cut you some slack just this once.
All right, men, let's retrieve our kills! We can\n
sell bits of 'em for funds, so don't miss a single\n
leg!
Ukon's Cohorts
Yessir!
Laughing in the wake of their victory, Ukon's men\n
move to carry out his orders.
Wow. Not a single casualty, huh? I guess this is\n
what you can expect from seasoned experts...
Haku. Show me your arm.
Huh?
Kuon comes up beside me and gently takes my hand,\n
inspecting the arm.
Huh. I took a shallow cut on my upper arm without\n
noticing.
I dunno if one of their jaws grazed me or what, but\n
I didn't notice it until Kuon touched it.
Hold still, OK?
Then, without a moment's hesitation, Kuon puts her\n
lips to the wound and sucks blood from it.
Ech. Ptooey.
Venom might've gotten into the wound, so...\n
Just in case.
Y-You didn't need to go that far...
My gaze locks with hers for a moment, and her eyes\n
seem to be... laughing?
I have a bad feeling about this.
Sssssshhhhhwup--
Ow, owowowOWOWOW--!!
Ptoo!
Eh heh heh. A man shouldn't raise his voice at\n
something as small as this, you know.
Why, you... You did that on purpose, didn't you?
Ignoring my accusation, Kuon skillfully applies a\n
salve to the cut and bandages it up tight.
There. All done. That should be enough for now,\n
I think.
*Whap!*
Ow!
Then, as if to declare her work finished, she\n
lightly pats the wound.
Eh heh.
A complaint brews on my tongue, but it dies when\n
I see Kuon's smile.
...She looks filled with relief that I'm safe.
Oh, yeah. Here.
I hold out the tessen--the metal fan I'd borrowed--\n
to Kuon.
It was a lifesaver. Thank you.
It's fine. You should hold onto it for a while,\n
Hm?
It'd probably be bad if you got caught unarmed in\n
a bad situation, so I'll let you hang onto it.
You sure? I got the sense it's kinda important to\n
you...
Mhm. Precious to me, actually.
Seriously? If that's the case, then why...?
Because you need it. That's why I want you to have\n
it for now.
OK, OK. If you're gonna keep insisting, I'll\n
hold onto it.
Mm. I'm only lending it to you, remember. I'll need\n
it back some day.
Most noble and valiant master! Master Haku! Didst\n
thou witness mine eldritch magecraft?
Urgh...
Forsooth, such ignoble beasts are as wheat 'neath\n
the reaperman's scythe before my spellweaving!
It's probably because I nursed him back to health,\n
but Maroro seems to be... getting weirdly attached\n
to me.
So, kid. How was it? You were awfully anxious for\n
how easy that job turned out to be, huh?
Ukon calls over to me, having finished barking\n
instructions at his men.
Man
The way you were carrying on, you got us all\n
anxious, too!
Wahahahaha!!
A roar of laughter rises from Ukon's men.
No, that was... I guess it was all just a\n
misunderstanding.
Misunderstanding?
Well, see--I was saved from a much bigger one of\n
these things attacking me not too long ago.
So when everyone started talking about gigiri,\n
I mistakenly assumed it was gonna be that huge one.
If I'd known it was just these little guys,\n
I wouldn't have gotten so worked up--
The laughter suddenly stops.
...Did I kill the mood?
...What did you... Say that again, kid?
Ukon stares at me, frozen. Not just Ukon--all his\n
men freeze in place, too.
You said you saw a much bigger one?
Y-yeah. It was... similar looking to these guys,\n
just... enormous.
Did its body seem hardened? Like an outer shell,\n
or a carapace?
Well...
At Ukon's questioning, I try to remember the details\n
of the attack.
Now that you mention it, yeah, its whole body seemed\n
to gleam black. It looked really tough.
And its horns were much longer, too.
Cripes. If that's the case, then we're in serious\n
troub--
Then, it happens before I can blink. A massive\n
shape bursts from the bushes, scything toward us--
There isn't any time to react as it blurs past a man\n
nearby, sending something flying up into the air.
Krrrkkkk krk krk--!!
Ah, it was something like this--
*THUMP*
What ho?
The flying object lands solidly in Maroro's hands,\n
catching him by surprise...
It has enough time to look at him and flap its mouth\n
in soundless anguish before it falls still.
HYEEEEEEEEEEE!?
Maroro's piercing scream echoes through the clearing.
AH--UAAAAAAHH!!
At the sound of Maroro's cry, the men around us\n
scramble, fleeing in all directions.
What the--
Gah! There are more little ones coming, too!
What's happening?
Keep your distance! Fall back and regroup--we'll\n
attack it all at once!
Several of the men nearby take up arms at Ukon's\n
command...
But more and more gigiri swarm out of the shadows\n
nearby, pouring forth in a ceaseless horde.
B-Be careful, they're--GYAAAAHH!!
Before anyone can ready their weapons, the gigiri\n
lay into Ukon's men with a vengeance.
Haku!
Hngh--
At Kuon's call, I snap out of my confused daze,\n
quickly crushing the gigiri attacking me.
Thanks. You're a lifesaver...
Nnhh. No wonder I thought our stories weren't\n
meshing. You were talking about this thing...
Kuon sighs, rubbing her temples.
Krrrrrkkkkk krk krk krk--!!
This is... bad, isn't it?
RRRAAAAHHH!!
Fall back! Carry the wounded if you can still stand!\n
MOVE!
Ukon mows down another gigiri, carrying\n
unconscious men over each of his shoulders.
You two! What are you doing, standing there like\n
that!? Get moving!
Y-Yeah--
With a knot of dread in my stomach, I move to obey,\n
trying my best to flee.
I... huh?
But I can't move. A heavy weight pins my legs down.
Bwuh... hyee... hyeeeeeee...!!
Wh--What are you clinging to my legs for!?
Aaaahh--awawawah!!
Damn it, I can't move! Hurry up and get on\n
your own two feet!
Thou m-mayst well ask the very trees to uproot and\n
spring legs! I-I'faith, I c-cannot move--
And I can't move because you're clinging to me!\n
Come on, get up!
I try to pull Maroro up to make him stand, but he's\n
clinging so tightly, I can't budge him.
N-No! Alack and cry thunder, but abandon not poor\n
Maroro to so pitiable an end!
That's why I'm telling you to stand! Do you WANT\n
to die!?
Damn it, I can't move with him on me like this...
What are you playing at, kid? We need to move, NOW!
DOES IT LOOK LIKE I'M PLAYING!?
As we continue to waste precious time, the gigiri\n
swarm surges forward...
And beyond them, the hulking, monstrous gigiri\n
gorges itself on the severed head of that poor man.
Uh-oh. We're surrounded.
You seem awfully calm. You have a plan of some kind,\n
I'm hoping?
I wouldn't call it a plan, but I can probably get\n
myself out.
What, JUST you?
Yeah, just me.
And where does that leave me?
...Well, if this isn't a fine pickle.
Hey, you're not gonna run off and abandon me, right?
Ahahaha, don't worry. If it were so easy to drive\n
me off, I would've abandoned you a long time ago.
But... tch. What should we do...?
So, this is it, huh...
Bah. I guess there's no choice.
Kid. Missy. I hate to ask this of you, but I need\n
you to get the others far away from here.
Ukon's voice carries an unusual weight...
What is he planning to do?
...Just wait a moment.
Kuon steps forward...
This is my last one, so I'd wanted to save it, but...
She takes the small tube hanging from her waist.
Ready, everyone? I'm going to open the way for us.\n
When I give the signal, cover your eyes and ears.
And then run as fast as your legs can carry you.
Oh, is this what she used when...?
I see. A flash grenade, huh?
Wh-What manner of weapon art thou making ready?
Here goes. Three...\n
Two...\n
Kuon yanks something from the flash grenade, then\n
hurls it with all her strength!
All right! Everyone, run!
GYEH!? Wh-What infernal light blazeth mine eyes!?
Urgh, I almost want to kick him down...
